mapper.insert:
SELECT "seq_user_no".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "user" ("user_no", "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path", "created_dt", "delete_flag") VALUES (#{userNo}, #{id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{social}, NULL, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT "user_no" AS userNo, "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, "created_dt" AS createdDt, "delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "user" WHERE "user_no" = #{userNo}

SELECT "user_no" AS userNo, "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, "created_dt" AS createdDt, "delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "user" ORDER BY "user_no" DESC OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT u."name" AS userName, COUNT(b."board_no") AS activityCount FROM "user" u JOIN "board" b ON u."user_no" = b."writer" WHERE u."delete_flag" = 0 AND b."delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY u."name" ORDER BY activityCount DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT u."name" AS userName, COUNT(c."comment_no") AS activityCount FROM "user" u JOIN "comment" c ON u."user_no" = c."writer" WHERE u."delete_flag" = 0 AND c."delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY u."name" ORDER BY activityCount DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
